item.title: You are here.
item.description: Here I am. After more than a decade serving various roles in numerous game development studios, technology companies, and flight simulation vendors, I find myself living in the most southern capital city on the planet…making movies, but not quite. I write software and develop pipeline architecture for data. In this case, it’s heaps of simluations, art content, video, and blah blah blah. It’s my day job, and I love it.
